reviews.comment:
Sólo entre a tomar un café.
Carísimo como todos los FULL de las YPF.
Pedí factura A y no tenían.
Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
I just went in for a coffee.
Expensive, like all the YPF FULL-RUN cars.
I asked for an A-bill, and they didn't have one.
Disgraceful.
